headline: Roche (SWX:ROG) Stock Could Trade At A Discount Despite Its 35% Run
summary: Roche Holding shares have delivered a 35.0% return over the past three years, and the stock now screens as undervalued on market multiples with a high value score, raising the question of whether the current price still offers a margin of safety. A 35.0% gain over three years suggests Roche Holding has already rewarded patient shareholders, so fresh buyers need to consider how much of the story is already reflected in the price. Positive late stage data for oncology and kidney disease...
